projectDescription: A proof-and-deployment platform for autonomous sports-trading agents that compete on TxLINE markets, with deterministic scoring, policy guardrails, and Solana-anchored verification.
keyFeatures: Live Agent Arena — N agents compete head-to-head on identical sealed TxLINE inputs
Agent Studio — configure and deploy agents from typed, bounded strategy templates
Deterministic law — CLV and edge recomputed from sealed evidence, never self-reported
Seven structural proof checks — falsifiable, tamper-evident, honest pass/fail
Solana Memo anchoring — run-manifest hash stored on Solana devnet for anchored runs
POST /runs/{id}/verify — anyone can recompute the proof from sealed evidence
Two-phase policy gate — kill-switch, stake caps, circuit breaker, slippage guards
Fail-closed live trading — operator-only live_guarded mode; no HTTP path arms real money
TxLINE StablePrice integration — de-margined consensus fair-value odds
Polymarket execution — read/write CLOB with event→market resolver and price-unit discipline
Closing-Line Value (CLV) leaderboard — recomputed rank, never gamed by abstentions
veridex-agent SDK/CLI — standalone agent runner using the same sealed proof pipeline
publicApiSurface: POST /demo/run — run a demo competition (offline, deterministic)
GET /leaderboard — CLV-ranked leaderboard across all stored runs
GET /runs/{run_id} — load a persisted run and return its proof card
POST /runs/{run_id}/verify — recompute proof from sealed evidence
POST /competitions — create a new competition from a CompetitionConfig
POST /competitions/{competition_id}/agents — register an agent on the competition roster
POST /competitions/{competition_id}/start — start a competition and return finalized state
GET /competitions/{competition_id} — return full competition state with leaderboard
GET /competitions/{competition_id}/events — ordered event log tail (seq > since_seq)
POST /backtest — run a backtest against a ReplayPack
GET /replay-packs — list available ReplayPack catalog entries
WS /arena — WebSocket stream for live arena events
veridex-agent run --config <agent.toml> — CLI: run a standalone sealed agent
docker build -f Dockerfile.agent — containerised agent deployment
